{{- partialCached "head.html" . }}
{{- partialCached "header/left.html" . }}
{{- partial "header/menu.html" (dict "menuID" "main" "page" .) -}}
{{- partialCached "header/right.html" . }}
{{- block "main" . }}{{- end }}

{{- partialCached "footer/js.html" . }}
